test:integration: cd cmd && echo '=== Building test binaries ===' && CGO_ENABLED=0 go test -c -tags=integration -o /tmp/_test_schema ./internal/schema/ && CGO_ENABLED=0 go test -c -tags=integration -o /tmp/_test_importer ./internal/importer/ && echo '=== Running inside Docker network ===' && docker run -d --name _test_runner --network resource-inventory_default -e TEST_DATABASE_URL='postgres://cmdb:cmdb_dev@postgres:5432/cmdb?sslmode=disable' alpine:latest sleep 120 > /dev/null && docker cp /tmp/_test_schema _test_runner:/test_schema && docker cp /tmp/_test_importer _test_runner:/test_importer && docker exec _test_runner chmod +x /test_schema /test_importer && echo '--- schema ---' && docker exec _test_runner /test_schema -test.v -test.run Integration -test.count=1 && echo '--- importer ---' && docker exec _test_runner /test_importer -test.v -test.run Integration -test.count=1; EXIT=$?; docker rm -f _test_runner > /dev/null 2>&1; rm -f /tmp/_test_schema /tmp/_test_importer; exit $EXIT
